records.question: Which paragraphs include the phrase "that I will not."?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs
WHERE paragraphs.plaintext LIKE '%that I will not.%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs WHERE paragraphs.PlainText LIKE '%that I will not.%'

records.question: Which paragraphs containing "Most sincerely." have a paragraph number of at most 2292?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs
WHERE paragraphs.plaintext LIKE '%Most sincerely.%' AND paragraphs.paragraphnum <= 2292
records.pred_sql: SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs WHERE PlainText LIKE '%Most sincerely.%' AND ParagraphNum <= 2292

records.question:
Which paragraphs numbered exactly 1585 include the text containing 'To signify that rebels there are up  
And put the Englishmen unto the sword:  
Send succors'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs
WHERE paragraphs.plaintext LIKE '%To signify that rebels there are up
And put the Englishmen unto the sword:
Send succors%' AND paragraphs.paragraphnum = 1585
records.pred_sql: SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs WHERE paragraphs.PlainText LIKE '%To signify that rebels there are up And put the Englishmen unto the sword: Send succors%' AND paragraphs.ParagraphNum = 1585

records.question: Which paragraphs numbered 2056 or higher include the phrase "were I human."?

WHERE paragraphs.plaintext LIKE '%were I human.%' AND paragraphs.paragraphnum >= 2056
records.pred_sql: SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs WHERE PlainText LIKE '%were I human.%' AND ParagraphNum >= 2056

records.question:
Which paragraphs at most number 302 include the text containing "or I will  
not open my lips so wide as a bristle may enter in  
way of thy excuse: my lady will hang thee for thy absence"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs
WHERE paragraphs.plaintext LIKE '%or I will
not open my lips so wide as a bristle may enter in
way of thy excuse: my lady will hang thee for thy absence.%' AND paragraphs.paragraphnum <= 302
records.pred_sql: SELECT paragraphs.id FROM paragraphs WHERE PlainText LIKE '%or I will not open my lips so wide as a bristle may enter in way of thy excuse: my lady will hang thee for thy absence.%' AND ParagraphNum <= 302
